evidence_rows.reading: V1.12B satisfies its mission once the first trainable dataset and report-only baseline both exist, while strategy training remains blocked.

interpretation: V1.12B closes successfully after the first owner-accepted pilot dataset is frozen and the first baseline readout is produced.
That is enough to stop without opening deployment, black-box work, or object widening.
The correct next posture is waiting state until the owner reviews the baseline output and decides the next experiment.
